channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon fait -100 € sur ce vidéoprojecteur 4K de 150″ qui transforme votre salon en cinéma
item.description: Le BenQ TK705i est un vidéoprojecteur connecté haut de gamme 4K UHD LED avec Google TV, pouvant servir aussi bien au cinéma qu'au gaming. Il est à retrouver pour 1 299 euros au lieu de 1 399 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: The Best Smart Home Accessories to Boost Your Curb Appeal (2026)
item.description: These locks, lights, and other smart home upgrades let you add automation without messing up your home’s vibe.

item.title: How to Clean Your Vinyl Records (2026): Vacuum, Ultrasonic, Solution, Brush
item.description: Those clicks and pops aren't supposed to be there. Give your music a proper bath with this handy guide.

item.title: 'Productivity and creativity shouldn’t live in separate silos': Why Canva's AI push is no different to its core principles of democratizing design
item.description: AI won't replace designers, but instead increase demand for creative expertise as more people gain access to design tools.

item.title: This hidden Samsung Galaxy S26 feature has changed how I watch Netflix and YouTube on the move
item.description: If you've got a new Galaxy S26 phone, then you've got access to an AI-powered tool for lowering background noise.

item.title: Cyberpunk platformers, gallivanting geckos and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Welcome to our latest roundup of what's going on in the indie game space. Once again, there are some neat new games for you to check out this weekend. We've got a bunch of updates and announcements for upcoming titles to tell you about too.There have been a bunch of solid indie showcases lately (and highlights from another one to tell you about below). If you want to learn about a ton of other games ASAP, you might want to set your alarm pretty early on April 25. Starting at 5AM ET that day, the latest edition of Indie Life Expo takes place on YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, Bilibili and elsewhere. T...

item.title: Best Buy's Ultimate Upgrade sale ends soon — here are the 23 best deals I'd buy on TVs, laptops, headphones, and more
item.description: Best Buy's surprisingly strong Ultimate Upgrade Sale ends on Sunday, so I've taken another look through and picked out the 23 best deals worth buying if you're shopping for some new tech.

item.title: La Rolls des consoles est de retour, et elle accepte vos vieilles cartouches
item.description: Avec la Neo-Geo AES+, SNK ressuscite son mythe sans passer par la case émulation.

item.title: Asus TUF Gaming A14 (2026) Review: GPU-Less Gaming Laptop
item.description: A gaming laptop without a discrete graphics card feels revolutionary, but the TUF Gaming A14 doesn't quite take full advantage of AMD's daring new silicon.

item.title: Schematik Is ‘Cursor for Hardware.’ Anthropic Wants In
item.description: Schematik is a program that aims to help people vibe code for physical devices. Hopefully, it won’t blow anything up.

item.title: It Takes 2 Minutes to Hack the EU’s New Age-Verification App
item.description: Plus: Major data breaches at a gym chain and hotel giant, a disruptive DDoS attack against Bluesky, dubious ICE hires, and more.

item.title: Where to Shop for Vinyl Records Online (2026): Discogs, Bandcamp, Ebay
item.description: Don’t just load up an Amazon cart! Here are the better ways to find your favorite vinyl records online.

item.title: How I quit social media for a month… and then ended up right back where I started
item.description: Here's what I learnt after trying to kick Reddit and YouTube cold turkey for a month.

item.title: ICYMI: the 7 biggest tech stories of the week, from new GoPro cameras to the 'most beautiful phone of 2026'
item.description: If you haven't been keeping tabs on the technology headlines over the past seven days, we've got you covered.

item.title: Private student loans: A cautionary guide to your options
item.description: Even if you’re facing a funding gap, here’s why you might want to think twice before cosigning your kid’s private student loan. Spring is in the air! The tulips are blooming, college acceptance letters are zooming into email inboxes, and the majority of parents with college-bound students are panicking about paying for their kid’s schooling.

item.title: Home prices are falling in these 89 housing markets—see what’s behind it
item.description: After a burst of softening, the count of major metros seeing year-over-year home price declines has stabilized over the past nine months. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: PlayStation 6 : puce Amethyst, jeux, lancement, prix… Tout ce que l’on sait sur la future console
item.description: Sony prépare la prochaine génération de consoles PlayStation. Voici tout ce que l'on sait déjà sur la future PS6.
